ownerBio: With over 30 years of hands-on experience, Mike still gets under the hood every day. ASE Master Technician certified, he leads by example and personally oversees every major repair that leaves the shop.
about: When Mike Reeves opened Precision Auto in 1998, he had one simple rule: treat every customer like a neighbor. Twenty-five years later, that philosophy hasn't changed.
aboutExtended: What started as a two-bay garage has grown into a full-service repair facility — but we've never lost that small-shop feel. We explain every repair in plain English, show you the old parts, and never push services you don't need.
aboutCredentials: We're proud to be ASE-certified, BBB-accredited, and trusted by over 5,000 families in the Springfield area.
tagline: Honest service. Expert repairs. Serving the community since 1998 with transparent pricing and certified mechanics.

trustBadges.title: ASE Certified
trustBadges.desc: All technicians are ASE certified professionals

trustBadges.title: Transparent Pricing
trustBadges.desc: Upfront quotes — no hidden fees, ever

values.title: Honesty First
values.desc: We'll never recommend a repair you don't need. Period.

values.title: Expert Technicians
values.desc: ASE certified with ongoing training on the latest vehicles.

values.title: Community Roots
values.desc: Proud sponsor of local teams, charity drives, and school programs.

values.title: Family Values
values.desc: We treat your car — and your family — the way we treat our own.

reviews.name: Maria Gonzalez
reviews.text: Took my car in for a weird noise — they found the issue fast, explained everything, and didn't charge me for anything I didn't need. Rare find!

reviews.name: David Park
reviews.text: Best prices in town and they actually show you the old parts. Been coming here for 3 years now with both our family cars.

reviews.name: Lisa Thompson
reviews.text: They squeezed me in same-day when my brakes started grinding. Fixed it in under 2 hours. Lifesavers!

reviews.name: James Walker
reviews.text: Honest mechanics are hard to find. These guys quoted me $400 less than the dealership for the same work. Will never go anywhere else.

services.title: Oil Change
services.descFull: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular oil changes. We offer conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic options.
services.warning: Dashboard oil light on? Overdue for a change? Don't wait — old oil causes engine wear.

services.title: Brake Repair
services.desc: Pads, rotors, and full brake service
services.descFull: Your brakes are the most important safety system on your vehicle. We inspect, repair, and replace brake components to keep you safe.
services.warning: Squealing, grinding, or soft brake pedal? Get your brakes checked immediately.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics
services.descFull: Check engine light on? We use advanced diagnostic equipment to pinpoint the exact issue and give you a clear explanation.
services.warning: A check engine light can mean anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine problem.

services.title: Transmission
services.descFull: Protect one of the most expensive components in your vehicle with regular transmission maintenance.
services.warning: Slipping gears, delayed shifts, or burning smell? Your transmission needs attention.

services.title: A/C Service
services.descFull: Stay cool with our complete A/C diagnostics and repair services.
services.warning: Blowing warm air? Weak airflow? Your A/C system may have a leak.

services.title: Tire Service
services.descFull: Maximize tire life and improve safety with proper tire maintenance.
services.warning: Uneven wear, pulling to one side, or vibration at speed? Time for tire service.

services.title: Electrical
services.descFull: Modern vehicles rely heavily on electrical systems. We diagnose and repair all electrical issues.
services.warning: Dim lights, slow cranking, or dead battery? Your electrical system needs attention.

services.title: Inspections
services.descFull: Stay safe and road-legal with thorough vehicle inspections.
services.warning: Buying a used car? A pre-purchase inspection can save you thousands.

specials.title: $10 Off Any Oil Change
specials.desc: Conventional or full synthetic. No appointment needed.

specials.title: Free Brake Inspection
specials.desc: Complete brake system check — pads, rotors, fluid, and more.

specials.title: 10% Off Your First Visit
specials.desc: New customer? Welcome! Take 10% off any service.

specials.title: $25 Off A/C Recharge
specials.desc: Stay cool this summer with a full A/C recharge and leak check.

specials.title: Free Tire Rotation
specials.desc: With any oil change service. Keep your tires wearing evenly.

specials.title: 15% Off Engine Diagnostics
specials.desc: Check engine light on? Let us find the problem at a discount.
